title: Codex CLI Plugin Manifest (dotnet-ai-kit)
description: Schema for .codex-plugin/plugin.json per https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build (retrieved 2026-05-19). Manifest fields are scalar relative paths with the `./` prefix (e.g., `"skills": "./skills/"`), NOT object/array wrappers. Codex CLI's documented plugin primitives are skills, MCP, hooks, apps, and assets. `keywords` is the only metadata field this manifest opts into for marketplace discovery. The plugin manifest does NOT bundle subagents — per https://developers.openai.com/codex/subagents (retrieved 2026-05-19), subagents are project-scoped TOML files at `.codex/agents/<name>.toml` written by CodexHost.write_per_solution_files(). Therefore `agents` AND `subagents` MUST NOT appear at the plugin manifest level (OOS-004 plugin-bundling portion still deferred to v1.1).

author.description: Per Codex plugin docs: optional publisher metadata. Minimum shape is `{name}`; `email` and `url` are documented as optional sub-fields.

homepage.description: Per Codex plugin docs: optional plugin homepage URL.

repository.description: Per Codex plugin docs: optional source-repository URL.

license.description: Per Codex plugin docs: optional SPDX license identifier (e.g., `MIT`, `Apache-2.0`).

logo.description: Per Codex plugin docs: optional plugin-root-relative path (or URL) to a logo asset. Currently `./assets/logo-icon.svg`, bundled via `tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel.force-include.assets`.

keywords.description: Per Codex docs (developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build): optional discovery tags for marketplace search.

interface.description: Per Codex docs: optional install-surface presentation metadata. Unused in v1 (kept as string-only for forward compat; the docs allow a richer object shape).

skills.description: Scalar relative path to the skills directory. The `./` prefix is required per Codex docs path rules.

mcpServers.description: Scalar relative path to the MCP servers config file.

hooks.description: Scalar relative path to the hooks config file.

apps.description: Scalar relative path to apps. Unused in v1.

assets.description: Scalar relative path to assets. Unused in v1.
